message:
feat: Resolution warning caching, packing fill, search enrichment, mining fixes

- Add warnings_json column to resolved_skill_cache (migration 012)
- Cache resolution warnings instead of discarding them
- Add final greedy fill phase to packing to utilize remaining budget
- Return SkillSearchCandidate from search_fts with metadata
- Fix code block extraction to support tilde fences (~~~)
- Add tokenize_command() for proper shell command parsing
- Fix tx_exists() boolean handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
